messages.sfx_no_permission: ❌ You don't have permission to use this command.
messages.sfx_cant_during_play: @{user} You can't add an sfx while a song is playing.
messages.sfx_invalid_effect: Invalid effect. Use one of the following: {effects}.
messages.credits_invalid_option: Invalid option. Use `{on_off_on}` to enable or `{on_off_off}` to disable.
messages.song_queue_limit: [@{user}], you can only queue up to 3 songs. Please wait until one finishes.
messages.unable_retrieve_song_details: [@{user}], I couldn't retrieve details for your song request. Please try a different keyword(s) or URL.
messages.song_duration_limit: [@{user}], your song: '{song}' exceeds the 12-minute duration limit and cannot be added.
messages.need_credit_to_queue: [@{user}], you need at least 1 credit to queue a song.
messages.insufficient_balance: You don't have enough balance to buy the song. Check your balance using `{bal_cmd}`.
messages.no_balance_tip: You don't have a balance yet. Tip the bot to get started!
messages.invalid_amount: Invalid amount. Please enter a valid number for the song(s) to buy.
messages.admin_refresh_wait: The bot is still initializing. Please wait a moment before using the /shutdown command.
messages.only_skipper_or_admin: Only the requester of the song or an admin can skip it.
messages.skip_action_in_progress: A skip action is already in progress. Please wait.
messages.no_song_to_skip: No song is currently playing to skip.
